# kSecAttrIsPermanent

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the item’s permanence.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrIsPermanent: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFBoolean] and indicates whether or not this cryptographic key or key pair should be stored in the default keychain at creation time.

On key creation, if not explicitly specified, this attribute defaults to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/kCFBooleanFalse].
title: kSecAttrIsPermanent
